---
name: Pull Request
about: Submit a pull request to improve the project
title: '[PR] '
labels: ''
assignees: ''
---

## Pull Request

### Description

A clear and concise description of what this PR does.

### Changes Made

- Change 1: Description
- Change 2: Description
- etc.

### Related Issues

Fixes #issue-number or addresses #issue-number

### Testing

Describe the testing you performed:

- [ ] Tested locally with Node.js version X
- [ ] Verified with multiple Bandcamp usernames
- [ ] Checked error handling

### Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the style of this project
- [ ] I have updated the documentation accordingly
- [ ] I have added tests for my changes (if applicable)
- [ ] All existing tests pass
- [ ] No sensitive data is included in my changes
